description: A server for accessing fruit information and nutritional data from the Fruityvice API, providing details about various fruits and their nutritional content.

tools.name: list_fruits
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all available fruits from the Fruityvice database.

limit.description: Maximum number of fruit results to return. If not specified, all available fruits are returned.

fruits.description: List of available fruits from the Fruityvice database.

name.description: The common name of the fruit (e.g., 'apple', 'banana', 'orange').

tools.name: get_fruit_nutrition
tools.description: Retrieve detailed nutritional information for a specific fruit by name.

fruit_name.description: The common name of the fruit to look up (e.g., 'apple', 'banana', 'orange').

name.description: The common name of the fruit (e.g., 'apple', 'banana', 'orange').

nutritions.description: Nutritional breakdown of the fruit per 100 grams of edible portion.

calories.description: Energy content in kilocalories (kcal) per 100g of the fruit.

fat.description: Total fat content in grams per 100g of the fruit.

sugar.description: Total sugar content in grams per 100g of the fruit.

carbohydrates.description: Total carbohydrate content in grams per 100g of the fruit.

protein.description: Total protein content in grams per 100g of the fruit.
